{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Titan’s Bone
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Titan]]'s Bone is an unbreakable nugget formed from ordinary rocks over centuries.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
